description: Introduction to plant location theory and analysis of models of plant location; models for determining plant size and time phasing; line balancing models; techniques for investigating conveyor and other material handling problems; and models of plant layout.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: I SY E 315, (I SY E 323orE C E/​COMP SCI/​I SY E  524) andI SY E/​PSYCH  349, or graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
